responsibilities: Analyze large, complex datasets to uncover actionable insights that inform product and business strategy
Design and build predictive models to forecast key business metrics such as churn, revenue, and demand
Design and analyze A/B tests to measure the impact of product changes on user behavior and KPIs
Build interactive dashboards and visualizations that communicate findings clearly to non-technical stakeholders
Partner with product and engineering teams to define data-driven success metrics for new feature launches
Clean, transform, and validate raw data from multiple sources to ensure analysis-ready datasets
Apply statistical hypothesis testing to validate assumptions and quantify confidence in business recommendations
Present findings and recommendations to leadership, translating technical results into clear business narratives
Develop and maintain reusable SQL queries and Python scripts for recurring reporting and analysis needs
Collaborate with data engineers to define requirements for new data pipelines supporting analytical needs
